query: 不对啊， 换了话题后，为什么宿主每伦的context 不能减小？

第 1 组先看 GC 行为，结论是：明显比旧版更像对的。 你的结果里有 3 个强信号： - `applied: true`，说明切题回问时确实触发了 GC。 - `promptReductionRatio: 0.7864`，说明工作集裁剪得很明显，不是轻微噪音。 - `relation: resolve`，虽然不是预期里的 `switch`，但这类“从代码 detour 回到先前旅行事实”的回问，被判成 `resolve`…

可是 每一轮的 Context(估算) 并没有减小啊
对，这就是现在最该警惕的误读点：`Context(估算)` 没明显变小，不等于 GC 没生效。 原因是现在有两个不同口径：
肉眼看到的 # Context History 也没有减小，一直增加，也是正常的？

是，通常正常。 `# Context History` 来自最近几轮的 `last_token_usage.input_tokens`，代码就在 [src/codex-vscode-context-minor-gc.js](/Users/redcreen/Project/unified-memory-core/src/codex-vscode-context-minor-gc.js:240) 和…
不对啊， 换了话题后，为什么宿主每伦的context 不能减小？

decision.archive_summary: Earlier test setup and validation concluded that GC was being applied in new threads and answered correctly for prior topic-switch probes (travel city: 京都; default editor: Zed). The current active topic is not those test results themselves, but why host-side per-turn context metrics and Context History do not visibly shrink after a topic switch. Keep the recent diagnostic thread about metric interpretation and host behavior; older solved test-run details can leave the next-turn raw prompt. Preserve as semantic pins the explanation that visible Context(估算)/Context History may use a different accounting path than the reduced next-turn working set, and that Context History is derived from recent input-token usage rather than directly showing post-GC raw-prompt shrinkage.
decision.reasoning_summary: The latest user turn is a direct follow-up to the unresolved diagnostic discussion in t8-t11, so this remains the same active topic: relation=continue. The raw prompt should retain the recent evidence explaining the discrepancy between GC effectiveness and host-visible context metrics. Earlier turns t1-t7 are a solved setup/test block and are no longer needed as raw context for the next answer. Pins preserve the durable explanatory points from t9 and t11 while allowing older solved turns to be evicted.
